key_decision: PubMedQA standardized dict includes pubid (not in original architecture.md spec) so contamination_check.py can do pubid-matching without re-reading raw HF rows — module isolation preserved.
last_completed: Data pipeline implemented (loader, formatter, contamination_check). 12/12 tests green. Datasets verified on CHPC: PubMedQA 211,269 train / 1,000 eval, MedMCQA 120,765 train / 2,816 val (single-choice filtered). Zero contamination confirmed. Smoke test passes. versions.lock written.
next_step: Request Llama-3.1-8B HF access (pending gated approval), then re-run model download. Once model is on scratch, Session 2: QLoRA training script + SLURM job.
blockers: Llama-3.1-8B-Instruct: HF gated access not yet approved. Must visit huggingface.co/meta-llama/Llama-3.1-8B-Instruct and accept license before model download can proceed.
